content: Hilt 2.57.1 is the latest stable version. Setup: add plugin com.google.dagger.hilt.android to root build.gradle.kts, add com.google.devtools.ksp plugin and hilt-android plugin to app build.gradle.kts. Dependencies: implementation(com.google.dagger:hilt-android:2.57.1) and ksp(com.google.dagger:hilt-compiler:2.57.1) — use hilt-compiler NOT hilt-android-compiler with KSP. @HiltAndroidApp on Application class. @AndroidEntryPoint on Activity. @HiltViewModel + @Inject constructor on ViewModel. hiltViewModel() in Composable. Java 17 required per official docs. KSP is preferred over KAPT for new projects.
